message:
test(unit): expand token_bucket.rs inline tests from 27 to 48 (+21) (ft-1gzu1)

Add 21 new tests covering: negative constructor args, available accessors,
wait_time_after_partial_refill, fill_ratio at half/zero, config serde default,
hierarchical accessors/clone/both-deny/consumes-both, clone independence,
sequential time acquires, reset preserves counters, backward time refill,
zero-cost acquire, debug format, BucketStats clone.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
